title: Nuclear Technology and Radiation Safety Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Nuclear Technology and Radiation Safety Program Learning Outcomes

Program Learning Outcomes

1. To gain professional and ethical responsibility

2. Gain physical reasoning and problem solving skills

3. Gain the ability to act independently, to use initiative, creativity and to work effectively in teams

4. Adopting the importance of life-long learning, to be able to improve itself by following up-to-date developments in the field and related fields

5. Ability to communicate effectively in Turkish verbal and written

6. Sufficient knowledge on nuclear technology and radiation safety; theoretical-applied knowledge in these areas and the ability to apply them to model and solve related problems.

7. Ability to identify, identify and solve nuclear technology and radiation safety problems; selecting and applying appropriate analysis and modeling methods for this purpos

8. To understand the basic concepts of nuclear physics, laws and relations between them correctly

9. To gain ability to design and conduct experiments and evaluate the results of the experiments in an individual and team work

10. To be able to solve physics problems by using information technologies, to be able to develop numerical model

11. Information on project management and practices in business life such as risk management and change management; awareness of entrepreneurship, innovation and sustainable development.
